title: Data Source
description: Provides test data from a CSV file, JSON file, or inline array. Rows are distributed across VUs using k6 SharedArray semantics.

name.description: Human-readable name of this data source.

path.description: File path for csv and json source types. Relative to the plan or absolute.

data.description: Inline data array for the inline source type. Each element is a row of key-value pairs.

sharing.description: How rows are distributed across VUs. 'shared' uses k6 SharedArray. 'per-vu' gives each VU its own copy. 'sequential' advances one row per iteration. 'random' picks a random row each iteration.

variable_name.description: The variable name used to reference this data in ${varName} interpolation.

first_row_is_header.description: Whether the first row of a CSV file contains column headers.

children.description: Data sources do not have children.
